title: High-Pressure Pump Component Manufacturing
entry_mechanism: Saudi precision machining company upgraded to desalination pump standards with international pump OEM partnership
executive_summary:
High-pressure pumps are the workhorses of reverse osmosis desalination — forcing seawater at pressures of 55–80 bar through RO membranes. Saudi Arabia's desalination plants run the world's largest fleet of RO high-pressure pumps, all manufactured abroad by Flowserve, KSB, Sulzer, and Grundfos. Pump impellers, casings, and shaft seals are precision-machined components accessible to Saudi Arabia's Jubail industrial base.

Node DT-2 targets Saudi manufacturing of high-pressure pump components: impellers, wear rings, bearing housings, and seal assemblies manufactured in Saudi Arabia to OEM specifications. The manufacturing processes — precision CNC machining of duplex stainless steel, surface finishing, and dimensional inspection — are directly adjacent to Saudi Arabia's existing oil and gas equipment manufacturing capability.

Saudi Arabia's addressable high-pressure pump component market — from its own desalination fleet maintenance plus GCC and MENA export — is estimated at $80–120 million annually. A Saudi-qualified pump component manufacturer would be the lowest-logistics-cost supplier for the Gulf desalination market.

companies.name: Flowserve
companies.rationale: Flowserve is the world's largest pump manufacturer with active Saudi Arabia desalination relationships. Saudi component manufacturing under Flowserve quality standards.

companies.name: KSB
companies.rationale: KSB supplies high-pressure pumps to Saudi desalination plants and has established international manufacturing partnerships. Non-ITAR German technology.

companies.name: Sulzer Pumps
companies.rationale: Sulzer is a leading desalination pump manufacturer with international parts manufacturing partnerships.

companies.name: Grundfos
companies.rationale: Grundfos produces high-pressure pumps for desalination and has active Saudi Arabia market presence.

companies.name: Xylem
companies.rationale: Xylem produces water infrastructure equipment and has Saudi Arabia government water utility relationships.

partners.name: Saudi Aramco Industrial Services (AMSCO)
partners.current: Precision machining for oil and gas; pump component repair; metallurgical testing
partners.upgrade: Extend precision machining to desalination pump components; KSB or Flowserve approved manufacturer programme; duplex stainless steel machining qualification; Saudi Water Company as anchor customer
partners.timeline: 18 months to first OEM-qualified component delivery

partners.name: Saudi Water Company (SWCC)
partners.current: Operates world's largest desalination fleet; all pump components imported
partners.upgrade: SWCC pump component localisation programme; 5-year Saudi component procurement commitment; SWCC technical standards for Saudi manufacturer qualification

partners.name: KFUPM Mechanical Engineering
partners.current: Fluid mechanics; pump theory; materials engineering
partners.upgrade: Desalination equipment engineering programme; pump component design and testing research; Saudi water industry engineer pipeline

partners.name: Jubail Industrial City / Heavy Machining Cluster
partners.current: Heavy machining for oil and gas; some water sector components
partners.upgrade: Dedicated water sector machining cluster at Jubail; shared metrology and testing equipment; ISO 9001 and API 610 cluster certification
